reason: Verify implementation matches researched Snacks terminal replacement, selector, shell migration, scoped mappings, and Overseer strategy handling.
Verify plugin specs remain valid and headless checks are run.
Verify terminal keymaps/options live in appropriate plugin files.
Verify keymap desc/group conventions and lazy.nvim spec shape.
Verify terminal keymaps are scoped to Snacks terminal and do not affect Claude Code terminal.
Verify no unintended keymap conflicts or platform-specific regressions.
Verify runtime access to Snacks terminal and selection metadata is guarded enough.
Verify helper functions remain small and justified.
